title: Account Hide National Holiday Options
excerpt: It would be very helpful on the General Admin tab under “Account” to be able to “Hide Holidays” exactly the way admin users can “Hide Weekends.” Even if there’s not a list of national holidays specific to a country, it w…

posts.author: Nordbadger (Matthew Nordby)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be very helpful on the General Admin tab under “Account” to be able to “Hide Holidays” exactly the way admin users can “Hide Weekends.” Even if there’s not a list of national holidays specific to a country, it would be great to be able to enter custom dates to hide.

This would make it easier to not accidentally schedule things on holidays, but also help flag billing to indicate additional steps for work done on holidays.

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am Michal from the spot-nik team. We just launched a new app- SuperPlanner. I believe it answers your needs. SuperPlanner can add any type of off days you’d like.
I wonder if this is still relevant for you, but here it is-

https://auth.monday.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=a72397016954aa33e272936988566142&response_type=install

Let me know what you think
